subtitles.original: 見上げて あの夜空に
subtitles.english: Looking up at that night sky

subtitles.original: ずっとわからないまま

subtitles.english: I won't be able to meet you.

subtitles.original: 誰にも見せないその姿を
subtitles.english: That appearance you show to no one,

subtitles.original: もうちょっとだけ見てたかったんだ
subtitles.english: I wanted to look at it just a little longer.
Time is gently glaring at us.

subtitles.original: 笑いあった声忘ればしないよ
subtitles.english: I will never forget our laughing voices.

subtitles.original: こんなにも流してた涙も
subtitles.english: Even the tears that flowed so much,

subtitles.original: 語る声もオーケストラ
subtitles.english: and our speaking voices, are an orchestra.

subtitles.original: さよならの声忘ればしないよ
subtitles.english: I will never forget the voice of farewell.

subtitles.original: あんなにも近くにいたはずが
subtitles.english: We were supposed to be so close,
even if I let myself drift

subtitles.original: 誰にも見せない僕の姿を
subtitles.english: My appearance, which I show to no one,

subtitles.original: もうちょっとだけ見せたかったんだ
subtitles.english: I wanted to show you just a little longer.
Time is gently glaring at us.
I want to make things clear.

subtitles.original: こんなにももどかしくて辛いのが
音を立てるオーケストラ

subtitles.english: Where and what are you doing?
The fact that I don't know
is because of me, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 永遠にこんな日がくるなんて
subtitles.english: That a day like this would last forever,

subtitles.original: 笑いあった声忘ればしないよ
subtitles.english: I will never forget our laughing voices.

subtitles.original: こんなにも流してた涙も
subtitles.english: Even the tears that flowed so much,

subtitles.original: 語る声もオーケストラ
subtitles.english: and our speaking voices, are an orchestra.

subtitles.original: さよならの声忘ればしないよ
subtitles.english: I will never forget the voice of farewell.

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Transcription and Translation: "Orchestra" (BiSH)**

Okay, here's the deal. I've got this video segment of a virtual group covering BiSH's "Orchestra," and I need to generate precise, time-stamped subtitles in both Japanese and English. This requires meticulous transcription and translation. First, I have to ensure the lyrics and their translations are accurate, then I must match each line of text with an accurate time in the video.

The song starts with a solo. I transcribed that section first, ensuring precise timestamps:

*   00:05.100 - 00:08.500: 見上げて あの夜空に (Miagete ano yozora ni) / Looking up at that night sky
*   00:08.500 - 00:12.800: 浮かぶ星達 (ukabu hoshitachi) / where stars float
*   00:12.800 - 00:17.600: ふっと君の声が (futto kimi no koe ga) / suddenly, your voice...
*   00:17.600 - 00:22.000: あの頃輝いてたかな (ano koro kagayaiteta kana) / Was it shining back then?
*   00:22.000 - 00:24.500: 今になっては (ima ni natte wa) / Now that it's over,
*   00:24.500 - 00:33.200: ずっとわからないまま (zutto wakaranai mama) / I still don't know.

Now, that's just the beginning. The on-screen text for "オーケストラ" appears at the beginning of the instrumental section, so I've got to ensure the subtitles include the title card:

*   00:36.500 - 00:44.500: \[オーケストラ] \[Song: Orchestra]

Next is the actual song:

*   00:56.200 - 00:58.500: あの時 (ano toki) / That time,
*   00:58.500 - 01:01.000: 君がついた嘘 (kimi ga tsuita uso) / the lie you told.
*   01:01.000 - 01:03.200: 問い正せずに (toi tasezu ni) / Without asking questions,
*   01:03.200 - 01:06.500: 泣いたあの坂道 (naita ano sakamichi) / I cried on that slope.
*   01:06.500 - 01:08.800: この先 (kono saki) / From now on,
*   01:08.800 - 01:11.400: 君と会えないの (kimi to aenai no) / I won't be able to meet you.
*   01:11.400 - 01:14.000: 離れ離れに (hanarebanare ni) / Letting myself
*   01:14.000 - 01:16.800: 身を任せてた (mi wo makaseteta) / drift apart.
*   01:16.800 - 01:21.200: いつもの後悔が (itsumo no koukai ga) / The usual regrets
*   01:21.200 - 01:23.000: 風に消えてく (kaze ni kieteku) / disappear into the wind.
*   01:23.000 - 01:28.000: 誰にも見せないその姿を (dare ni mo misenai sono sugata wo) / That appearance you show to no one,
*   01:28.000 - 01:33.400: もうちょっとだけ見てたかったんだ (mou chotto dake mitetakatta nda) / I wanted to look at it just a little longer.
*   01:33.400 - 01:39.000: 時がそっと睨んでる (toki ga sotto nirander
